THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 174 ELLIS STREET #517, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $835.00 RENT, $133.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $968.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-15-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 5PM ON 6-15-97. IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMNT & DISMISS W/PREJ WITH PLTF WAIVING UNPAID BACK RENTS. PLTF TO PROVIDE NEUTRAL REFERENCE ONLY. IT IS ORDERED THAT ENTIRE CASE RECORD, INCLUDING THE JUDGMNT, BE SEALED.
